notes: Provider presets are execution contracts for scripts/run_image_generation.py. They are safe to inspect because secrets are referenced only by environment variable name.
Dry-runs never require API keys. Real calls require --execute and a configured key unless auth_scheme is none.
Generated images must be text-free visual assets for backgrounds, atmosphere, concepts, scenarios, objects, textures, or moodboards. Evidence images must come from source/user/web routes instead.

Provider names such as Nanobanana or Seedream/即梦 may appear as optional user-facing setup choices, but do not hardcode their endpoint, model name, or auth scheme here until verified. Configure them through a local provider override, OpenAI-compatible HTTP preset, Jimeng/Qiaomu proxy, or async-task preset as appropriate.
Never ask users to paste API keys into chat, project reports, slide files, or shell history snippets. Ask for an environment variable name or provide local setup instructions.

operator_notes: Use this preset only when the Qiaomu Jimeng proxy key is intentionally configured.
Do not store the key in project files, shell history snippets, reports, or generated decks.
This preset encodes the async submit/poll shape. If the provider requires a different task_type or payload wrapper, override payload_template in a local provider config.
A completed task without a returned image is treated as failure, not success.
